name: depth-tier-materials
description: Verify ten contiguous 12x6x75 tiers of 4x4x4 destructible blocks, correctly placed transition markers, unique impact identities, and material-matched debris.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local blocks=root['Depth Blocks'] local expected={'Rock','Concrete','Metal','Glass','CrackedLava','CorrodedMetal','DiamondPlate','Basalt','Glacier','Foil'} local materials,styles,impacts,edges={},{},{},{} local badGrid,badState,badTransition,badMaterial=0,0,0,0 local perTier={} for _,b in ipairs(blocks:GetChildren()) do local layer=b:GetAttribute('Depth') local col=b:GetAttribute('Column') local row=b:GetAttribute('Row') local tier=b:GetAttribute('MaterialTier') local expectedPos=Vector3.new(-2+(col-6.5)*4,(row-.5)*4+.25,-37-(layer-1)*4) if (b.Position-expectedPos).Magnitude>.01 or b.Size~=Vector3.new(4,4,4) then badGrid+=1 end if not b.Anchored or not b.CanCollide or not b.CanQuery or b.Transparency>.01 then badState+=1 end if b.Material.Name~=expected[tier] or b:GetAttribute('DebrisMaterial')~=expected[tier] or b.Material==Enum.Material.Neon or b.Material==Enum.Material.ForceField then badMaterial+=1 end local transition=(layer-1)%8==0 if b:GetAttribute('TierTransitionStart')~=transition then badTransition+=1 end materials[b.Material.Name]=true styles[b:GetAttribute('TextureStyle')]=true impacts[b:GetAttribute('ImpactEffectStyle')]=true edges[b:GetAttribute('EdgeTreatment')]=true perTier[tier]=(perTier[tier] or 0)+1 end local function count(t) local n=0 for _ in pairs(t) do n+=1 end return n end local markers=root.Polish['Depth Corridor'] local markerErrors=0 for tier=1,10 do local marker=markers:FindFirstChild(string.format('Tier %02d Roadside Marker',tier)) local startLayer=(tier-1)*8+1 local endLayer=math.min(tier*8,75) local z=-37-(startLayer-1)*4+6 if not marker or marker.CanCollide or marker:GetAttribute('TierStartLayer')~=startLayer or marker:GetAttribute('TierEndLayer')~=endLayer or math.abs(marker.Position.Z-z)>.01 then markerErrors+=1 end end local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=1e12,WallLevel=99,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) for tier=1,10 do local layer=(tier-1)*8+1 c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=layer,column=6,row=2}) end task.wait(.12) local debris=root['Depth Physics Debris'] local debrisMismatch=0 for _,fragment in ipairs(debris:GetChildren()) do local blockName=string.match(fragment.Name,'^(DepthBlock_L%d+_C%d+_R%d+)') local source=blockName and blocks:FindFirstChild(blockName) if not source or fragment.Material~=source.Material then debrisMismatch+=1 end end local valid=#blocks:GetChildren()==5400 and badGrid==0 and badState==0 and badTransition==0 and badMaterial==0 and count(materials)==10 and count(styles)==10 and count(impacts)==10 and count(edges)==10 and markerErrors==0 and #debris:GetChildren()==60 and debrisMismatch==0 return H:JSONEncode({blocks=#blocks:GetChildren(),materials=count(materials),styles=count(styles),impacts=count(impacts),edges=count(edges),badGrid=badGrid,badState=badState,badTransition=badTransition,badMaterial=badMaterial,markerErrors=markerErrors,debris=#debris:GetChildren(),debrisMismatch=debrisMismatch,valid=valid})

steps.label: ten connected material tiers and debris identities are correct
